appTooltip.message:
Click - Open Saved List

Ctrl+Click - Save Current Tab

btnSave.description: Button to save the active tab.

headerTitle.description: Header title for the saved tabs list.

footerTip.message: + Click icon to save current tab without opening popup
footerTip.description: Footer tip for fast save mode (after the Ctrl key).

saveModeSaveOnly.description: Option to save tab without closing.

saveModeSaveAndClose.description: Option to save tab and close it.

restoreModeRestoreOnly.description: Option to restore tab without removing from saved list.

restoreModeRestoreAndRemove.description: Option to restore tab and remove from saved list.

activateAfterRestoreLabel.description: Label for activate tab after restore checkbox.
